key_drivers: US-Israel strikes on Iran triggering geopolitical risk-off; Strait of Hormuz fears spiking oil +8-13% and gold +2.8%
10Y real yields rising sharply (+10bps to 4.051%) on inflation fears from oil shock, crushing equity and gold valuations
VIX surging to 21.44 (+7.96%), credit spreads widening, yield curve flattening — all pointing to equity bear regime
BOJ hawkish hiking cycle + safe-haven demand = strong JPY thesis; FX bloc bullish as USD strength offset by rate differentials
ISM Manufacturing PMI 52.4% and GDPNow 3.0% signal strong US growth, reducing Fed cut probability and weighing on equities

stale_sources: FRED DFII10 (used search fallback for real yield level)
World Gold Council ETF flows (Jan 2026 data, most recent available)

RBA stance: Reuters/RBA citing hike to 3.85% on Feb 3, 2026
